mapper.insert: /* 일괄 피드백 등록 ForumFdbkDAO.insertForumAllFdbk */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK ( DSCS_FDBK_ID , DSCS_ID , USER_ID , TEAM_ID , FDBK_CTS , DELYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT FN_NEW_ID('FDBK') , DSCS_ID , USER_ID , TEAM_ID , #{fdbkCts} , 'N' , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId}
mapper.select: /* 피드백 조회 ForumFdbkDAO.selectFdbk */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY REG_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(DSCS_FDBK_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT , DSCS_FDBK_ID AS forumFdbkCd , UP_DSCS_FDBK_ID AS parForumFdbkCd , DSCS_ID AS dscsId , USER_ID AS stdId , TEAM_ID AS teamCd , FDBK_CTS , DELYN , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS RGTRNM , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK A WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND USER_ID = #{stdId} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC
